title: Xenial Smoky Ukrainian Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Ukrainian lamb stew infused with the pungency of dried mint and the depth of smoky flavors, tailored to ayurvedic tamasic principles.
instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the browned lamb from the pot and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the minced garlic, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it starts to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, dried mint, salt, and black pepper, stirring to combine.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, stirring to combine with the spice mixture.
Add the browned lamb back into the pot, along with the lamb broth and tomato paste, stirring to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2.5 hours.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dried mint if desired.
